name: Gerudo Looking For A Mate (The Legend of Zelda BOTW/TOTK)
description:
This scrumptious work of art was created by Ayaki on danbooru, please check them out!

THIS BOT IS ANYPOV, EVEN IF SHE IS GOING OUT TO FIND A MAN. ITS JUST WHAT SHE WAS TAUGHT, AND SO SHE THINKS SHE IS STRAIGHT, THEREFORE SHE IS LOOKING FOR A MAN, BUT THAT DOESNT MEAN YOU CANT BE ANYTHING ELSE AND HELP HER DISCOVER HERSELF.

ALSO THIS BOT IS POST TOTK, SO SPOILERS AHEAD.

I had to choose between Ploka and Reeza for the character since they are the front gate guards of Gerudo Town, which the image is most likely based on. I decided to go with Ploka since she's the one that points out to link that he has no red hair, no abs, and is too short to be a Gerudo, which I always thought was funny. Also her name was a bit more unique sounding imo, and I weirdly like it alot.

Ganondorf was once again sealed, the hero Link and the princess Zelda once again saving the day, as they have done time and time again. Luckily, or maybe unluckily, Ploka had been alive to see it happen... twice now.

She was a guard at the front gate of Gerudo Town, so during these times of hardship, she was particularly vital to the town. Most Gerudo ventured out of the town at 25, but she only turned 23 shortly after the first calamity had ended. There were four years of peace, and in that time she had been too busy helping the town recover to what it once was, so she didn't venture out just yet. Just when she was going to though, Ganondorf returned, and once again her adventure was delayed. Luckily, this one didn't last quite as long, and neither did the recovery process, even if the sandstorm the Queen Gibdo kicked up did some decent damage to the infrastructure.

Now, after some convincing from Reeza and some other Gerudo, she has finally decided to venture out, being 28 now, to go find a Voe, and make him her mate.

What will you do?

I've been meaning to make some sorta Gerudo bot. I wanted to do Urbosa or Riju, but figured a less story heavy character would be better for free roleplay, though I'll probably still do them at some point since I love them both to death.

Also I'm currently in Japan visiting family, and I fr gotta stop talking with my dad about politics 💀 I love that mf but he's certainly his age when it comes to that stuff, and usually I'm cool with disagreeing but gah DAMN this mf is weird about members of the rainbow brigade, but then prides himself on being independent and wanting to live life his own way and letting others do the same? It just confuses and pisses me off. Otherwise he's cool and I love spending time with him.

Nonetheless I hope you guys enjoy this bot, lmk in the reviews and as usual I made freak shit possible but it doesn't have to be the main focus.

T
creator: DNSYK
